name: Gmail API
description: Read, send, and manage email messages, threads, labels, drafts, and settings in Gmail mailboxes.

capabilities.name: users_getProfile
capabilities.description: Gets the current user's Gmail profile including email address, message and thread counts.

capabilities.name: users_watch
capabilities.description: Sets up or updates a push notification watch on the given user mailbox via Cloud Pub/Sub.

capabilities.name: users_stop
capabilities.description: Stops receiving push notifications for the given user mailbox.

capabilities.name: messages_list
capabilities.description: Lists the messages in the user's mailbox.

capabilities.name: messages_get
capabilities.description: Gets the specified message by ID including headers, body, and metadata.

capabilities.name: messages_send
capabilities.description: Sends the specified message to the recipients in the To, Cc, and Bcc headers.

capabilities.name: messages_insert
capabilities.description: Directly inserts a message into the mailbox bypassing most scanning and classification.

capabilities.name: messages_delete
capabilities.description: Immediately and permanently deletes the specified message.

capabilities.name: messages_trash
capabilities.description: Moves the specified message to the trash.

capabilities.name: messages_untrash
capabilities.description: Removes the specified message from the trash.

capabilities.name: messages_modify
capabilities.description: Modifies the labels on the specified message by adding or removing label IDs.

capabilities.name: messages_batchDelete
capabilities.description: Permanently deletes many messages by message ID.

capabilities.name: messages_batchModify
capabilities.description: Modifies the labels on many messages at once.

capabilities.name: messages_import
capabilities.description: Imports a message into the mailbox with standard email classification, similar to SMTP receiving.

capabilities.name: messages_attachments_get
capabilities.description: Gets the specified message attachment by its ID.

capabilities.name: threads_list
capabilities.description: Lists the threads in the user's mailbox with optional search filtering.

capabilities.name: threads_get
capabilities.description: Gets the specified thread including all messages in it.

capabilities.name: threads_delete
capabilities.description: Immediately and permanently deletes the specified thread.

capabilities.name: threads_trash
capabilities.description: Moves the specified thread to the trash.

capabilities.name: threads_untrash
capabilities.description: Removes the specified thread from the trash.

capabilities.name: threads_modify
capabilities.description: Modifies the labels applied to the thread.

capabilities.name: labels_list
capabilities.description: Lists all labels in the user's mailbox.

capabilities.name: labels_get
capabilities.description: Gets the specified label by ID.

capabilities.name: labels_create
capabilities.description: Creates a new label in the user's mailbox.

capabilities.name: labels_update
capabilities.description: Updates the specified label.

capabilities.name: labels_patch
capabilities.description: Patches the specified label with partial updates.

capabilities.name: labels_delete
capabilities.description: Immediately and permanently deletes the specified label.

capabilities.name: history_list
capabilities.description: Lists the history of all changes to the given mailbox.

capabilities.name: drafts_list
capabilities.description: Lists the drafts in the user's mailbox.

capabilities.name: drafts_get
capabilities.description: Gets the specified draft including the message content.

capabilities.name: drafts_create
capabilities.description: Creates a new draft with the DRAFT label.

capabilities.name: drafts_update
capabilities.description: Replaces a draft's content with new content.

capabilities.name: drafts_delete
capabilities.description: Immediately and permanently deletes the specified draft.

capabilities.name: drafts_send
capabilities.description: Sends the specified existing draft to the recipients.

capabilities.name: settings_getAutoForwarding
capabilities.description: Gets the auto-forwarding setting for the specified account.

capabilities.name: settings_updateAutoForwarding
capabilities.description: Updates the auto-forwarding setting for the specified account.

capabilities.name: settings_getVacation
capabilities.description: Gets vacation responder settings.

capabilities.name: settings_updateVacation
capabilities.description: Updates vacation responder settings.

capabilities.name: settings_getLanguage
capabilities.description: Gets language settings for the specified account.

capabilities.name: settings_updateLanguage
capabilities.description: Updates language settings for the specified account.

capabilities.name: settings_filters_list
capabilities.description: Lists the message filters of the specified account.

capabilities.name: settings_filters_get
capabilities.description: Gets a specific message filter by ID.

capabilities.name: settings_filters_create
capabilities.description: Creates a message filter.

capabilities.name: settings_filters_delete
capabilities.description: Deletes a message filter by ID.

capabilities.name: settings_forwardingAddresses_list
capabilities.description: Lists the forwarding addresses for the specified account.

capabilities.name: settings_forwardingAddresses_get
capabilities.description: Gets the specified forwarding address.

capabilities.name: settings_forwardingAddresses_create
capabilities.description: Creates a forwarding address.

capabilities.name: settings_forwardingAddresses_delete
capabilities.description: Deletes the specified forwarding address.

capabilities.name: settings_sendAs_list
capabilities.description: Lists the send-as aliases for the specified account.

capabilities.name: settings_sendAs_get
capabilities.description: Gets the specified send-as alias.

capabilities.name: settings_sendAs_create
capabilities.description: Creates a custom 'from' send-as alias.

capabilities.name: settings_sendAs_update
capabilities.description: Updates a send-as alias.

capabilities.name: settings_sendAs_delete
capabilities.description: Deletes the specified send-as alias.

capabilities.name: settings_sendAs_verify
capabilities.description: Sends a verification email to the specified send-as alias address.

capabilities.name: settings_delegates_list
capabilities.description: Lists the delegates for the specified account.

capabilities.name: settings_delegates_get
capabilities.description: Gets the specified delegate.

capabilities.name: settings_delegates_create
capabilities.description: Adds a delegate with verification status set to accepted.

capabilities.name: settings_delegates_delete
capabilities.description: Removes the specified delegate and revokes access.
